sections.heading: Logs Tab Overview
sections.content: The Logs / Debug tab (tab_logs.py) streams real-time events from all NEXUS subsystems into a scrollable text panel. Every INFO, WARNING, and ERROR event emitted by the VisionEngine, TacticalSerial, CalibrationMath, and GUI layers is captured and displayed with a timestamp, log level, and source module. This is the first place to check when something is not working as expected.

sections.heading: Log Level Reference
rows: Engine started, model loaded, calibration loaded, hardware connected
Non-fatal issues that may affect performance
Hardware disconnected, RMS > 1.0 px, low FPS, no target for N seconds
Failures that prevent a subsystem from functioning
Camera failed to open, model not found, serial permission denied, JSON parse error
Verbose internal state — disabled by default
Per-frame timing, Kalman state, raw serial bytes

sections.heading: Log Message Format
sections.code:
# Format: [TIMESTAMP] [LEVEL] MODULE: message

[14:23:01.441] [INFO]    VisionEngine: Model loaded — yolo11x-pose.engine (task=pose)
[14:23:01.882] [INFO]    VisionEngine: Cameras opened — L:index=1 (1280×720) R:index=4 (1280×720)
[14:23:02.104] [INFO]    TacticalSerial: Connected to COM8 @ 115200 baud
[14:23:02.108] [INFO]    VisionEngine: Stereo calibration loaded — focal=892.4px baseline=8.3cm RMS=0.41px
[14:23:02.112] [INFO]    VisionEngine: Laser homography loaded — 18 points, reproj_error=1.2px
[14:23:02.115] [INFO]    VisionEngine: Calibration mode: ✅ FULLY CALIBRATED
[14:23:05.320] [INFO]    VisionEngine: Target LOCKED — conf=0.91 depth=1.84m pan=88.2° tilt=149.1°
[14:23:35.771] [WARNING] VisionEngine: No detection for 30.0s — returning to home position
[14:24:11.002] [WARNING] TacticalSerial: Heartbeat timeout — marking as disconnected
[14:24:16.003] [INFO]    TacticalSerial: Reconnected to COM8 — laser state restored (ON)
[14:24:58.991] [ERROR]   VisionEngine: Camera index 4 failed to open — check CAM_R_IDX

sections.heading: Key Log Messages and Their Meaning
rows: TensorRT engine successfully loaded on GPU
Both cameras opened successfully at configured indices
Stereo .npz loaded and rectification maps applied
Laser alignment matrix H loaded from .npz
Both calibration files present — full capability
Target acquired and IoU lock confirmed
No detection for 30.0s — returning to home
Safety timeout triggered — servos homed, laser off
ESP32 stopped responding — auto-reconnect will begin
Reconnected to COM8 — laser state restored
Hardware link restored after drop — laser intent re-applied
Wrong CAM_R_IDX — check Settings and try different index
Model file not found at path
MODEL_PATH does not point to an existing file
COM port is in use by another application
Stereo calibration quality is poor — recapture images
Homography computation failed — not enough points
Laser alignment has fewer than 4 valid correspondence points

sections.heading: How Logging Works Internally
sections.content: NEXUS uses Python's standard logging module throughout. All subsystems use a named logger that is captured by the Logs tab handler:
sections.code: # Pattern used in each NEXUS module: import logging logger = logging.getLogger('VisionEngine') # or 'TacticalSerial', etc. # Emitting log events: logger.info(f"Model loaded — {model_path} (task={self.task})") logger.warning(f"No detection for {elapsed:.1f}s — returning to home position") logger.error(f"Camera index {idx} failed to open — check CAM_R_IDX") # In tab_logs.py — GUI handler that captures all log output: class QtLogHandler(logging.Handler): def __init__(self, text_widget): super().__init__() self.widget = text_widget def emit(self, record): msg = self.format(record) # Append to QTextEdit with color based on level: color = { logging.INFO: '#00e676', logging.WARNING: '#facc15', logging.ERROR: '#ef4444', }.get(record.levelno, '#ffffff') self.widget.append(f'{msg}')

sections.heading: Enable Debug Logging
sections.content: Debug logging is disabled by default for performance. To enable verbose per-frame debug output, set the log level to DEBUG at startup:
sections.code:
# In main.py — before QApplication is created:
import logging
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.DEBUG,   # Change to logging.INFO for normal use
    format='[%(asctime)s.%(msecs)03d] [%(levelname)-7s] %(name)s: %(message)s',
    datefmt='%H:%M:%S'
)

# DEBUG log messages include:
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine: frame_time=22.4ms inference_time=18.1ms dispatch_time=0.3ms
# [DEBUG] GhostPredictor: raw=(641,318) kalman=(639,315) velocity=(2.1,-0.8)
# [DEBUG] TacticalSerial: TX=b'P88.5T148.3L1\n' RX=b'ACK:88.5,148.3'

sections.heading: Save Logs to File
sections.content: For bug reports or post-session analysis, you can redirect all logs to a file simultaneously with the UI display:
sections.code:
# Add a FileHandler to also write logs to disk:
import logging

file_handler = logging.FileHandler('nexus_debug.log', mode='w', encoding='utf-8')
file_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
file_handler.setFormatter(logging.Formatter(
    '[%(asctime)s.%(msecs)03d] [%(levelname)-7s] %(name)s: %(message)s',
    datefmt='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
))
logging.getLogger().addHandler(file_handler)

# nexus_debug.log will be created in the project root
# All log events (including DEBUG) are written to it
# Send this file when reporting bugs

sections.heading: Clear Logs Button
sections.content: The Logs tab includes a CLEAR button that wipes the visible log panel. This does not affect any log file — it only clears the in-memory display buffer. Useful when you want to isolate log events from a specific action (e.g., clearing before clicking START ENGINE to see only startup events).

sections.heading: Auto-Scroll Behavior
sections.content: The log panel automatically scrolls to the latest entry. If you scroll up to review older entries, auto-scroll pauses. It resumes once you scroll back to the bottom. You can also use the SCROLL LOCK toggle button (if present) to keep the view frozen at any position.

sections.heading: Log Events by Subsystem
rows: Model load, camera open, calibration load, target lock/lost, safety timeout, FPS drop warning
Connect, disconnect, reconnect, heartbeat timeout, command TX, ACK RX, laser state change
Filter reset (on lock lost), confidence changes (debug only)
Homography compute result, reprojection error, triangulation result
Image pair accepted/rejected, calibration progress, RMS result, save success
Load from file, save to file, missing key warnings, JSON errors
MATLAB engine start, .mat load result, conversion success/failure

sections.heading: Performance Profiling via Logs
sections.content: When DEBUG level is enabled, each frame emits timing information. Use this to identify bottlenecks:
sections.code:
# Example DEBUG frame timing log:
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine: ──── Frame Timing ────
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine:   capture_time   =  8.2ms  (camera read)
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine:   rectify_time   =  1.1ms  (stereo remap)
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine:   inference_time = 18.4ms  (YOLO forward pass)
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine:   kalman_time    =  0.1ms  (GhostPredictor)
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine:   homography_time=  0.1ms  (perspectiveTransform)
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine:   dispatch_time  =  0.3ms  (serial write)
# [DEBUG] VisionEngine:   total_frame    = 28.2ms → 35.4 FPS

# If inference_time dominates → switch to lighter model or rebuild .engine
# If capture_time > 15ms → use USB 3.0 ports, lower resolution
# If dispatch_time > 5ms → check for serial port lag or high baud mismatch

sections.heading: Common Warning Patterns and Actions
list: Repeated 'No detection' warnings: CONFIDENCE threshold may be too high, or target is partially occluded. Lower CONFIDENCE in Settings (try 0.35).
Repeated 'Heartbeat timeout' warnings: USB cable or power issue with ESP32. Try a different cable or USB port. Check if another app is competing for the COM port.
Repeated 'Lock lost' warnings: IOU_THRESHOLD may be too high, or target is moving faster than MAX_Y_TOLERANCE allows. Increase MAX_Y_TOLERANCE or lower IOU_THRESHOLD.
Low FPS warning (< 10 FPS): Either model is too heavy for the GPU or cameras are the bottleneck. Check if using .engine vs .pt and verify TensorRT is active.
Calibration mode ⚠️ UNCALIBRATED RAW every startup: STEREO_FILE path in Settings does not point to the correct .npz — check the path and regenerate if needed.
